title: [Non-Record] 26.5M Int6 QAT + EMA (Pending Compute)
author: DevWizard-Vandan
body:
## Summary
Non-record experiment for a 26.5M parameter GPT variant with int6 QAT, EMA evaluation/serialization, sliding-window validation, Muon weight decay, 2048-token context, 12 layers, 3x MLP, and zstd-compressed int8-style artifact export.

This is pending compute and is not intended as a leaderboard record claim yet. I am a CS undergrad in Pune, and I am sharing this because recruiters actively look for this exact caliber of low-level systems engineering and resourcefulness from students: tight memory/size accounting, quantization-aware training, compression tradeoffs, and making the math work on constrained local hardware.

## Local Log Evidence
Run setup:
```text
model_params:26501720
world_size:1 grad_accum_steps:8
train_batch_tokens:16384 train_seq_len:2048 iterations:20000 warmup_steps:20 max_wallclock_seconds:600.000
attention_mode:gqa num_heads:8 num_kv_heads:4
tie_embeddings:True embed_lr:0.05 head_lr:0.0 matrix_lr:0.04 scalar_lr:0.04
```

Training/eval trace:
```text
step:0/20000 val_loss:6.9348 val_bpb:4.1072 train_time:0ms step_avg:0.01ms
QAT enabled at step 1000 with 6 bits
step:1000/20000 train_loss:2.7153 train_time:330269ms step_avg:330.27ms
step:1000/20000 val_loss:2.8170 val_bpb:1.6684 train_time:330275ms step_avg:330.28ms
step:1600/20000 train_loss:2.5633 train_time:577129ms step_avg:360.71ms
step:1666/20000 val_loss:2.5940 val_bpb:1.5363 train_time:600233ms step_avg:360.28ms
stopping_early: wallclock_cap train_time:600233ms step:1666/20000
peak memory allocated: 1466 MiB reserved: 1906 MiB
```

Size/math trace:
```text
Serialized model: 104999074 bytes
Code size: 49286 bytes
Total submission size: 105048360 bytes
Serialized model int8+zlib: 9980950 bytes (payload:26658144 raw_torch:26712716 payload_ratio:3.94x)
Total submission size int8+zlib: 10030236 bytes
final_int8_zlib_roundtrip val_loss:2.6248 val_bpb:1.5546 eval_time:353868ms
final_int8_zlib_roundtrip_exact val_loss:2.62480552 val_bpb:1.55455768
```

## Notes
Only `train_gpt.py` is included in this PR. Local model artifacts and logs were intentionally not committed.
